margin: 0, fontSize: "28px", color: "white", }, navLinks: { display: "flex", gap: "16px", }, loginBtn: { padding: "12px 24px", borderRadius: "12px", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)", "36px", width: "90%", marginBottom: "40px", }, heroButtons: { display: "flex", gap: "18px", marginBottom: "50px", }, startBtn: { background: "linear-gradient(135deg,#f97316,#fb923c)", border: "none", statsRow: { display: "flex", gap: "20px", }, statCard: { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", padding: "24px", borderRadius: "20px", width: "140px", backdropFilter: "blur(14px)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", textAlign: "center", }, right: { width: "40%", display: "flex", justifyContent: "center", }, mainCard: { width: "100%", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", borderRadius: "13px", fontWeight: "bold", }, serviceGrid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(2,1fr)", gap: "18px", }, serviceCard: { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", borderRadius: "20px", padding:
